subject: # === Conceptual model — nutuk modelled with FRBR (WEMI) ===
# The single "book" is split into the four FRBR levels:
#   nutuk               = frbr:Work            (the speech as an abstract creation)
# is about        -> dct:subject          frbr:Work -> skos:Concept / schema:Country
# is delivered to -> schema:about         frbr:Work -> schema:PoliticalParty
# is realised in  -> frbr:realization     frbr:Work -> frbr:Expression
# is embodied in  -> frbr:embodiment      frbr:Expression -> frbr:Manifestation
# has publication date -> dct:issued      frbr:Manifestation -> xsd:gYear
# is published in      -> schema:locationCreated   frbr:Manifestation -> schema:City
# is exemplified by    -> frbr:exemplar   frbr:Manifestation -> frbr:Item
